zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Stradling於1469年出生在英國維爾爾道千時，她的父親Sir John Stradling39歲，母親Alice Langford29歲。她和Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfey至少有4個兒子和7個女兒。她去世於1539年12月29日在英國英格蘭維爾爾道千享年70歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾道千。

nameMeanings.name: Stradling
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Strättlingen near Thun in Switzerland. The English landed family bearing this name, with a seat at Saint Donats (Glamorgan), traces its origins to John de Estratlinges (died c. 1293), who came to England from Switzerland with Otto de Grandison, Edward I's companion-in-arms.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Stradling was born in 1469, in Dauntsey, Wiltshire, England, her father, Sir John Stradling, was 39 and her mother, Alice Langford, was 29. She had at least 4 sons and 7 daughters with Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfey. She died on 29 December 1539, in Dauntsey, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70, and was buried in Dauntsey, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 7 filles avec Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfey. Elle est décédée le 29 décembre 1539, à Dauntsey, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Dauntsey, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Stradling(이)가 1469년 영국 윌츠히르 도츠이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Stradling(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Langford(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfey(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1539년 12월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 도츠이에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 도츠이에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Stradling родилась в 1469 г. в местности даунци, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Stradling было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Langford, 29. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 7 дочерей от Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfey. Она умерла 29 декабря 1539 г. в местности даунци, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности даунци, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Stradling nació en 1469, en Dauntsey, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Stradling, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Alice Langford, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 7 hijas con Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfey. Murió el 29 de diciembre de 1539, en Dauntsey, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Dauntsey, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
